---
title: "Blueprint"
subtitle: "Original statements and proofs, our Lean formalization, and what it strengthens"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

This blueprint pairs every node of Geshkovski, Rigollet, and Ruiz-Balet,
*[Measure-to-measure interpolation using Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.04551)*
(arXiv:2411.04551v3), with its machine-checked Lean 4 formalization. For each node it reproduces the
**original statement (and proof, where short) verbatim**, gives **our formalization** (a Lean
statement, a prose proof, the real source listing, and an honest status badge), and, where relevant,
**what our work strengthens**.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Authorship.** The mathematics, theorems, and proofs are the work of the original authors. The Lean
formalization, the experiments, the prose informalizations, and this blueprint are the work of
Alexandre Quemy. Original statements and proofs are reproduced verbatim, in clearly marked grey boxes
with a page-cited attribution, for scholarly comparison (fair use).
:::

How to read the boxes:

::: {.from-paper}
**From the original paper.** Grey boxes reproduce the authors' statements and proofs verbatim, with a page-cited attribution.
:::

::: {.our-work}
**Our formalization.** Blue boxes hold our Lean statement, a prose proof, the real source listing, and a status badge: [machine-checked]{.badge .ok} (clean Lean kernel proof), [axiomatised]{.badge .axiom} (rests on a labeled axiom for missing Mathlib theory), [open]{.badge .open} (a Lean `sorry`), or [informal]{.badge .informal} (reviewed on paper).
:::

::: {.strengthen}
**What we strengthen.** Green boxes record a corrected sign error (F1), a rigor gap discharged by a kernel-checked leaf (F2), or what had to be axiomatised.
:::

A node is badged [machine-checked]{.badge .ok} only if its Lean kernel axiom set is clean
(`propext`, `Classical.choice`, `Quot.sound` only), verified by `#print axioms` via `bin/axiom-report`.
The standalone A-to-Z PDF of this blueprint is at [blueprint.pdf](blueprint.pdf).

{{< include proofs/_foundations.qmd >}}

{{< include proofs/_leaves.qmd >}}

{{< include proofs/_mass-transport.qmd >}}

{{< include proofs/_disentangle.qmd >}}

{{< include proofs/_matching.qmd >}}

{{< include proofs/_main-results.qmd >}}
